home.description: New Modern Art District - NMAD - is a nomadic and digital contemporary art gallery, exhibiting a limited collection of visual art curated by our advisory board to bring emerging artists into private exhibition spaces: your spaces.

services.label: More than art
services.headline:
We help you find it,
frame it and place it.

items.title: Curation
items.desc: We select the ideal artworks for your space and lifestyle.

items.title: Decoration
items.desc: We integrate art into your interior design project.

items.title: Framing
items.desc: Custom framing and mounting solutions for every artwork.

items.title: Installation
items.desc: Professional installation in your home, office or commercial space.

contact.label: NMAD
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Interested in a work or need curation, framing, or installation advice? Write to us and we'll get back to you shortly.
